ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisites for the course */,
  "syllabus" TEXT /* Link to the course syllabus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course to which the activity belongs */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts made on the activity */,
  "youtube_link" TEXT /* Link to the YouTube video related to the activity */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the activity */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity for which the submission is made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the solution */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of the submission */,
  "solution" TEXT /* Content of the submitted solution */,
  "file_upload" TEXT /* Link to the uploaded file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission to which the grade corresponds */,
  "score" REAL /* Score awarded for the submission */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the user for the submission */,
  "graded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who graded the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_graded_by FOREIGN KEY ("graded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the user is enrolled in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedbacks" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course related to the feedback */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedbacks_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedbacks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedbacks_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learning_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course related to the resource */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity related to the resource (if applicable) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., article, video) */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* Link to the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_resources_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose data is being recorded */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course related to the analytics */,
  "total_time_spent" REAL /* Total time spent by the user on the course (in hours) */,
  "completion_rate" REAL /* Completion rate of the course by the user (as a percentage) */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Last date the user accessed the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., assignment submission, grade update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which the certification is issued */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the certification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
